title: Belapur Fort
tagline: Belapur Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Belapur Fort is a fort near the township of Belapur in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Belapur Fort is a fort near the township of Belapur in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. The fort was built by the Siddhis of Janjira. It was later conquered by the Portuguese, and then Marathas. In the early 19th century, the fort was captured by the British.

nearestAirport.name: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: CBD Belapur
topPlaces.description: The Central Business District of Belapur (C.B.D Belapur) is a large upscale coastal suburb of Navi Mumbai. The Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation is headquartered in Belapur.

topPlaces.name: Navi Mumbai
topPlaces.description: Navi Mumbai (Marathi: [nəʋiː mumbəi]; also known as New Bombay, its official name until 1995) is a city in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, located in the Konkan division of the Western Indian state of Maharashtra. Navi Mumbai is situated on the Indian mainland, opposite Salsette Island and the city of Mumbai, and is part of Thane district and Raigad district.

topPlaces.name: Nexus Seawoods
topPlaces.description: Nexus Seawoods, formerly known as Seawoods Grand Central Mall, is a shopping mall located in Seawoods, Navi Mumbai. Launched in 2017 as Seawoods Grand Central, it was built as Transit Oriented Development, allowing seamless access to the mall from suburban railway.

topPlaces.name: Nerul
topPlaces.description: Nerul (Pronunciation: [neɾuːɭ]) is a residential and commercial node in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Nerul is located in the Harbour Line, Trans-Harbour Lines and Nerul-Uran Line of Mumbai local train network where Kharghar and Vashi are the nearby stations.

topPlaces.name: Jama Masjid, Nerul
topPlaces.description: Jama Masjid, also known as the Nerul Aalami Markaz and as the Masjid-E-Tabligh, is a Sunni Friday mosque, affiliated with the "shura" faction of the Tablighi Jamaat, located in East Nerul, in Navi Mumbai, in the state of Maharashtra, India. The mosque is the oldest and largest mosque in Nerul and one of the main mosques of Navi Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Bamandongri
topPlaces.description: Bamandongari (IAST: Bāmaṇḍoṅgrī) is a historical village and a node of Navi Mumbai's Raigad district, situated in Maharashtra, India. There is Hanuman Temple in Bamandongari and also a primary school.

topPlaces.name: DY Patil Stadium
topPlaces.description: The DY Patil Stadium is a multi-purpose sports arena in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Owned by Dnyandeo Yashwantrao Patil, it is based in the DY Patil Sports Academy in Nerul.

topPlaces.name: 2008 Indian Premier League final
topPlaces.description: The 2008 Indian Premier League final was a day/night Twenty20 cricket match played between the Rajasthan Royals and the Chennai Super Kings on 1 June 2008 at the DY Patil Stadium, Navi Mumbai to determine the winner of the 2008 Indian Premier League, a professional Twenty20 cricket league in India. It ended as the Royals defeated the Super Kings by three wickets.

items.note: The Central Business District of Belapur (C.B.D Belapur) is a large upscale coastal suburb of Navi Mumbai. The Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation is headquartered in Belapur.

Navi Mumbai (Marathi: [nəʋiː mumbəi]; also known as New Bombay, its official name until 1995) is a city in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, located in the Konkan division of the Western Indian state of Maharashtra. Navi Mumbai is situated on the Indian mainland, opposite Salsette Island and the city of Mumbai, and is part of Thane district and Raigad district.

Nexus Seawoods, formerly known as Seawoods Grand Central Mall, is a shopping mall located in Seawoods, Navi Mumbai. Launched in 2017 as Seawoods Grand Central, it was built as Transit Oriented Development, allowing seamless access to the mall from suburban railway.

Nerul (Pronunciation: [neɾuːɭ]) is a residential and commercial node in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Nerul is located in the Harbour Line, Trans-Harbour Lines and Nerul-Uran Line of Mumbai local train network where Kharghar and Vashi are the nearby stations.

Jama Masjid, also known as the Nerul Aalami Markaz and as the Masjid-E-Tabligh, is a Sunni Friday mosque, affiliated with the "shura" faction of the Tablighi Jamaat, located in East Nerul, in Navi Mumbai, in the state of Maharashtra, India. The mosque is the oldest and largest mosque in Nerul and one of the main mosques of Navi Mumbai.

Bamandongari (IAST: Bāmaṇḍoṅgrī) is a historical village and a node of Navi Mumbai's Raigad district, situated in Maharashtra, India. There is Hanuman Temple in Bamandongari and also a primary school.
The DY Patil Stadium is a multi-purpose sports arena in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. Owned by Dnyandeo Yashwantrao Patil, it is based in the DY Patil Sports Academy in Nerul.

The 2008 Indian Premier League final was a day/night Twenty20 cricket match played between the Rajasthan Royals and the Chennai Super Kings on 1 June 2008 at the DY Patil Stadium, Navi Mumbai to determine the winner of the 2008 Indian Premier League, a professional Twenty20 cricket league in India. It ended as the Royals defeated the Super Kings by three wickets.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Belapur Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Belapur Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Belapur Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (19 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Belapur Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Belapur Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Belapur Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Belapur Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Belapur Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are CBD Belapur, Navi Mumbai, Nexus Seawoods, Nerul, Jama Masjid, Nerul.
